title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Zoro, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, CP0, York as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I know you guys are strong,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I'm not going to fight you head on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a minute, what is the meaning of this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are they split among them- selves?

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: I put both of them to sleep...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Did Rob Lucci get beaten up?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even after 20 years in hiding, she remains our ally.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you send your own spy into the intelligence agency?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't mean to... but that's how it turned out.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
